summary: Well-engineered deliverable. Workflow follows best practices: pinned action refs (checkout@v4), minimal permissions (contents:read), sensible triggers (push/PR/schedule/dispatch). cleanup.sh is correct: set -euo pipefail, proper quoting, early validation, clear error handling, good separation of policies (max-age, keep-latest, max-total-size). test-act.sh comprehensive but has repetitive assertion blocks (lines 93-98, 101-104) checking for exact summary strings that could be refactored into a helper loop. Minor: parallel arrays in cleanup.sh are effective but fragile if indices drift; inline shell script in workflow plan job (lines 37-55) could extract to separate script. Overall: production-ready, well-tested, proper error propagation and cleanup. Would ship.
